name: moodle-exporter
description: Local Moodle exporter for collecting course materials from an authenticated browser session.

scripts.check: node --check src/auth.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/exporter.js && node --check src/analyze.js && node --check src/md-to-pdf.js && node --check src/render-mermaid.js && node --check src/utils.js
